payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields are: (1) token_count (input/output), (2) provider_id and model_id, (3) estimated_price, (4) latency_p50, latency_p90, latency_p95. These fields enable cost calculation, provider-specific pricing, and performance percentile tracking.
payload.decision: Commit structured memory cards defining mandatory accounting fields with relationships to provider/model context

entity_resolution.reason: Fixture defines required fields for eval accounting; no conflicts detected

payload.intent: Document required evaluation accounting fields for cost, latency, and token metrics in Brain memory system

memory_cards.statement: Token count (input and output separately) is a required field for eval accounting
Provider and model IDs are required to contextualize token pricing and performance
Estimated price (derived from token counts and provider/model rates) is required for cost tracking
Latency percentiles (p50, p90, p95) are required for performance evaluation

details: Committed 4 memory cards defining accounting fields
Established relationships between token counts, provider/model IDs, and cost
Documented latency percentile metrics for performance evaluation
No superseded facts; all fields marked as required with high confidence
